neuro_concentrate.summary: This example capsule demonstrates how an operational task can be represented without changing the outer law of the capsule model. The inner payload is small and intentionally generic, but the complete object still shows the validator-friendly shape expected by CapsuleOS. It is useful for public reference docs, CLI smoke checks, and downstream tooling that needs one compact task sample while remaining independent from private operator data. Because the capsule stays in draft status and carries no graph links, it is easy to validate in isolation while still expressing the same structural discipline as richer production capsules.
